prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A bird's-eye view of a project campus. In the center, a hub building labeled "index.ts" connects via pathways to four satellite buildings. North: "types/" building (blue, foundational, with type definition blueprints visible through windows). East: "store/" building (green, with data storage shelves and CRUD operation signs). South: "cli/" building (orange, with a command terminal entrance and user-facing signage). West: "tests/" building (purple, with checkmark flags and test report boards). Clean pathways with arrows show import relationships between buildings. The overall layout feels like a well-planned campus viewed from above.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
